name: Treat Non-Spyware Malware as Offenses
notes: Reports malicious software (malware) attacks on events.  Enable this rule if you wish all events categorized as malware to create an offense.
conditions_text: where the Event Category for the event is one of the following Malware.Hostile Mail Attachment , Malware.Hostile Software Download, Malware.Malicious Software , Malware.Misc Malware, Malware.Unknown Malware
TD_list: APPLY Treat Non-Spyware Malware as Offenses on events which are detected by the undefined system

AND where the Event Category for the event is one of the following Malware.Hostile Mail Attachment , Malware.Hostile Software Download, Malware.Malicious Software , Malware.Misc Malware, Malware.Unknown Malware
